title: CorrectiveRehabApp
description: End-to-end biomechanical analysis pipeline for gym exercises.
highlights: Detects 8 lift-specific form issues (knee valgus, hip shift, butt wink, forward lean, etc.) with 0–100 symmetry scores and severity grading per rep across 6 exercises

Mobile skeleton visualizer renders react-native-svg overlays (24 joint connections, teal/orange/red severity coloring) with a side-by-side session diff view classifying issues as improved/regressed/resolved/new

title: Computer Science Flashcards
description: Spaced repetition built on principles of cognitive science to learn Computer Science fundamentals.
highlights: FSRS algorithm (superior to Anki's SM-2) adapts card intervals to personal learning patterns
Cross-device sync via Supabase, offline support as a PWA, and 30-day review history dashboard

title: Concept Visualizer
description: Visual learn technical concepts through AI-powered step-through animated node graph.
highlights: Covers only computer science domains in networking, algorithms, databases, and system design
AI explanations (Groq llama-3.3-70b) rendered as interactive React Flow graphs with Dagre auto-layout

title: Electronic Health Records
description: Enable clinics to digitise patient records.
highlights: Role-based access control (RBAC) with separate patient and doctor portals for managing medical records
Soft-deletion mechanism with timestamp-based recovery to preserve medical record history, ensuring synchronized data visibility across patient and doctor account views.
